allow: PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\willj\\coverfight; $job = Start-Job { node C:\\Users\\willj\\coverfight\\server.cjs }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $out = Receive-Job $job; $state = $job.State; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job; Write-Host "State: $state"; Write-Host "Output: $out")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('STATUS:', j.status\); console.log\('ANALYSIS?', !!j.analysis\); console.log\('LETTER?', j.letter ? j.letter.slice\(0,120\)+'...' : 'no'\); const tl=j.notes?.timeline||[]; tl.forEach\(t=>console.log\(' -', t.event\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./test_result.json'\); console.log\('STATUS:', j.status\); console.log\('HAS_ANALYSIS:', !!j.analysis\); console.log\('LETTER_START:', j.letter ? j.letter.slice\(0,150\) : 'NONE'\); const tl=j.notes&&j.notes.timeline||[]; tl.forEach\(t=>console.log\(' -', t.event\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./tr2.json'\); console.log\('STATUS:', j.status\); console.log\('WIN_PROB:', j.analysis&&j.analysis.winProbability\); console.log\('LETTER_CHARS:', j.letter ? j.letter.length : 0\); console.log\('LETTER_START:', j.letter ? j.letter.slice\(0,200\) : 'NONE'\); const tl=\(j.notes&&j.notes.timeline\)||[]; tl.forEach\(t=>console.log\(' -', t.event\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./tc.json'\); console.log\('STATUS:', j.status\); const tl=\(j.notes&&j.notes.timeline\)||[]; tl.forEach\(t=>console.log\(' -', t.event\)\);")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total cases: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f'  [{c[\\"id\\"]}] {c[\\"status\\"]} | {c[\\"insurer\\"]} | {c[\\"procedure\\"]}'\) for c in d[-5:]]")

Bash(ls "/c/Program Files/" 2>/dev/null | head -30; ls "/mnt/c/Program Files/" 2>/dev/null | head -30)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, Id, CPU, WorkingSet, @{N='CPU%';E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU, 1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
